$comment: Destructive-safety denylist for a connected project. Copy into the target project (path recorded in ai-workflow/project-context.md), fill with real protected identifiers, and keep it read-only to the agent. Extend it only through a reviewed human change that also updates any dependent tests/scanner assertions. See skills/destructive-safety/SKILL.md.

protected_ids.$comment: Identifiers a run must NEVER target with a destructive call. Group by kind for readability; all values are matched literally.

protected_logins.$comment: Literal credentials/usernames that must never be deleted, reset, or have passwords changed.
